name: Astaxanthin + Vitamin E + Vitamin C | অ্যাসটাজেনথিন + ভিটামিন ই + ভিটামিন সি | Indications, Pharmacology, Dosage, Side Effects & other Generic info with Available Brand names in Bangladesh
indications: AstriVit is indicated for the prevention and management of: Skin disorders (e.g. dryness, aging, pigmentation) Eye fatigue, inflammation, and oxidative damage Infertility and hormonal imbalance Chronic inflammatory conditions Cognitive decline or mental fatigue Cardiovascular diseases
pharmacology: AstriVit is a premium antioxidant supplement formulated with Astaxanthin, a naturally occurring carotenoid derived from Haematococcus pluvialis algae. Astaxanthin helps protect cells from oxidative damage, supports skin hydration, elasticity, and improves skin micro-texture-reducing signs of aging such as spots, wrinkles, and fine lines. It also crosses the blood-retinal barrier, helping to reduce eye fatigue and inflammation.Additionally, Astaxanthin enhances blood circulation, improves physical and mental stamina, aids energy production, reduces muscle soreness, and boosts endurance.Vitamin C, a water-soluble antioxidant, supports the immune system, fights infections, and improves connective tissue recovery from minor injuries. Vitamin E (D-alpha Tocopherol) is the most potent and bioavailable form of Vitamin E, known for its antioxidant role in cellular protection.
dosage_&amp;_administration: Take 1-3 capsules daily, preferably after meals with water, or as directed by a registered healthcare professional.
interaction: Astaxanthin may interact with: Finasteride, Dutasteride, and ImmunosuppressantsIts absorption may be reduced by: Cholestyramine, Colestipol, Mineral Oil, OrlistatVitamin E with anticoagulants may increase bleeding riskVitamin C may alter effects of: Amygdalin, Indinavir, Antacids, Aspirin
contraindications: Individuals with bleeding disorders Known hypersensitivity to Astaxanthin, Vitamin E, or Vitamin C
side_effects: Well tolerated when taken as recommended. In rare cases, the following may occur: Abdominal discomfort Diarrhea Red-colored stools Increased bowel movements
pregnancy_&amp;_lactation: No sufficient safety data is available for use during pregnancy or breastfeeding. Consult a physician before use.
storage_conditions: Store below 25 C. Keep away from light and moisture. Keep out of reach of children
